description: ParentGatewayReference identifies an API object including its namespace, defaulting to Gateway.

group.description: Group is the group of the referent.

kind.description: Kind is kind of the referent. For example "Gateway".

name.description: Name is the name of the referent.

namespace.description: Namespace is the namespace of the referent.  If not present, the namespace of the referent is assumed to be the same as the namespace of the referring object.
